description: Operator observation during template work: 'some of these are probably good bead formulas or wrkstrm templates too.' The 6 schema templates landed are GENERIC (open-namespace placeholders for any consumer). Wrkstrm-flavored variants would pre-fill with wrkstrm conventions: privacyPolicyURL=https://wrkstrm.com/legal/privacy/<slug>, supportURL=https://wrkstrm.com/support/<slug>, owner=wrkstrm, copyright='wrkstrm Inc.', target-platforms default, code-of-conduct link, etc. These live under `private/universal/substrate/collectives/wrkstrm/` (not in the schema family templates dir). Each template gets a wrkstrm-prefilled .json that an app team copies as the starting point. Bead-formula angle: each of the 6 templates also corresponds to a bead-spawning work pattern (e.g., 'file privacy disclosure for vX.Y.Z') — that's a separate effort tracked under the gastownhall/beads work layer.
title: Author wrkstrm-flavored variants of the schema templates under wrkstrm collective
